string 2:
Whew, am I glad to see you! Here's the deal. I got this
weird—more like creepy—Digiline.

It was enough to freak even me out. There was no way
I could tackle this one on my own.
{next}What's strange about it?
{next}Is it a tip for your channel??
{next}Just ignore it.

Well... it's asking me to do something. Like, something
I'm pretty sure is illegal.

Seems like one, at least. After all, it's thanks to these
tips that I'm at 2 million subs...
No way! I could be missing out on the story of the century!
I don't know the sender, but here's what it says:

"Sneak into a D-SAT vehicle tonight. I'll give you the
exact location later."
...That's all.
{next}Isn't that a crime?
{next}Is it some kind of prank?
{next}This is so exciting!

I think so too, but this doesn't feel like a simple ploy to
make me break the law...

That's what I thought at first, but then he started giving
more instructions and, I felt like I was being watched.

Oh, right. I almost forgot. You're the biggest weirdo out
there.

...Huh? OMG, I just got another message from the same
sender!

Lessee... "The person next to you does not dress very well.
They should put on something more cyber."

D-Does that mean we're being watched right now?! And based
on what the message said...
{next}My outfit stinks?
{next}Is it a threat, letting us know they're watching?
{next}That was a huge compliment.

I didn't wanna say it, but you do kinda stand out. Or, at
least, you don't look "cyber."

Maybe, but we can't ignore what the message said. Seems they
want you to change clothes.

Hate to break it to you, but that wasn't a compliment. They
said you need to go change!

It gives me shivers not knowing where we're being watched
from, but let's play along.

Do you have any cyber clothes? I know it's a bother, but I
was hoping you could change.

Hit me up once you do. We might just get another message
from our stalker.

Let's humor them for now. Go put on a more cyber outfit,
okay?

Wow! Somebody sure knows how to glow up! Yeah, I think that
ought to do the trick.

...Aha! I knew it! Another message!
The timing really makes me feel like we're being watched.
{next}What's it say?
{next}Wanna check the area?
{next}Maybe they're watching even now?

Gimme a sec... Ew. This... definitely implies this creep is
stalking us in real time.

I get the feeling we won't find them. They'd only take this
approach if they were sure.

Yeesh, don't say that... Hey, a message! "I'm watching." Aw,
c'mon. This is legit creepy!

Here's the rest of the message. "It appears you know how to
do as you're told."

"You are a most spirited streamer. And that yellow T-shirt
is suitably cyber."

"I deem you worthy. On a nearby bench, you'll find an ID
card and USB drive. Go get them."
{next}Let's go look.
{next}Someone else might grab the stuff.
{next}I was hoping for a better reward.

That's the plan. Don't you worry. We've come too far to end
the game now.

I can't imagine they'd overlook that. I bet they'd make sure
only we get the goods.

What? Hey, this stuff could be really valuable! You were
hoping for a snack, maybe?

Anyway, let's go check the benches around here. I'll be
right there beside you!
Oh! Hey, this must be it. There's an ID card and USB drive!

They're kinda warm, like someone was holding them and left
them here just a second ago.
We're gonna take 'em... right?

Agh! A-Another message! Were they waiting for us to get
here...?

Let's see... "Now go to Shinjuku Park and get in the
D-SAT vehicle there"?!

I-It's here! The dreaded order! This is it... the beginning
of my life of crime...
{next}Let's at least go scope it out.
{next}Maybe we should stop here.
{next}Yeah! Let's do this!
Y-Yeah. We can always bounce if it feels too sketch.

I like that idea— Uh-oh, another message! "No turning back
now." Guess there's no escape!

You're really something! I could learn a thing or two
from you about being a streamer... Actually, scratch that.

Anyway, let's head to Shinjuku Park. Maybe the vehicle
isn't even there...

But given how things have gone so far, I'm pretty sure it
will be...

Yep, there's our vehicle, as expected!
That's definitely a D-SAT vehicle.

But there's an officer right by it. No way we're getting
anywhere near—

W-We've got trouble! Digimon have escaped from the 
Digimon District!
Wh-What was that? We're on our way!

Well, that solves that. But the timing was a little too
perfect...

There might be someone inside, though. Let's get closer and
check!
Oh. Looks like you need to scan an ID to get inside!

W-Wait... No way. It couldn't be that ID we got just a
little while ago, could it?

But if it doesn't work, we can always run for it. Okay, I'm
gonna try the card.

ID check in progress... Kodai Kuremi... Confirmed.
Unlocking...
It's unlocked! But who's this "Kodai Kuremi"...?

Could he be the one who's been ordering us around? Maybe
he's a public safety insider?
{next}Let's just get in.
{next}You wanna run for it?
{next}I've heard that name before.
Really? But, we HAVE come this far, so... we may as well.

I don't think it'd work. This person's kept tabs on us every
step of the way...
Don't get any bad ideas! You'd get us busted for real!

Anyway, standing out here in the open isn't going to do us
any favors.

Phew, deep breaths... Time to show some streamer steel.
Okay, let's get in!

Uh-oh. Looks like a bunch of stuff we should definitely not
mess with. Now, let's see...

There's another message. "Insert the drive into the USB port
in front of you."

Ugh! But now that we're in, best to go big or go home,
right? Here goes... nothing!

Hey, looks like the computer is automatically loading data
from the USB drive.
Project EDEN...? What's that? "Eden" is...
{next}Paradise.
{next}An electronics store.
{next}A stew with fish cakes and daikon.

Oh, right! Like "Garden of Eden." Wonder what kinda project
would borrow that for its name.

So handy how it also sells food and office supplies. But we
aren't talking about Edion!

I hope you just misheard me, because I can't believe you'd
make such an awful "oden" pun.

The client is Jindai Technology? "We'll use any means necessary 
to achieve our goal." Hmm. That's somewhat disturbing.

And this image with some creature inside a capsule... The
apex of genome technology? That's a big "nope" for me!

Hey, it's loading the next file. Hmm. Looks like some kind
of personal diary.
{next}Whose could it be?
{next}How much could a personal diary be worth?
{next}Feels kinda wrong to read someone's diary.

Sounds like some kind of scientist, maybe some big
shot, given the arrogant tone.

A whole lot, I'd imagine. It probably contains info only
they know, details on connections, feelings, plans.

Look... We're WAY past the point of cold feet. Think of all
we did to get here.

"Despite my results on the IQ test, I can't accept
the thought of Yuya as the successor."

"I despise them, both Yuya and Simmons." "But Simmons' lab
is mine now! All that remains is to execute the plan."

This all sounds like a bunch of whining. I doubt I'd get
along with the author...
Upload complete.

Oh, looks like it's done. Let's take the USB drive with us,
just in case.

Probably not a great idea to stick around here any longer
than we have to. Let's go!
Whew... That officer hasn't come back yet. Lucky us!

Another message. "Leave the ID and drive on the bench.
You'll find your reward there."

Not gonna lie. I can't wait to get rid of this drive. Let's
find that bench, like, now!

We've still gotta return the ID and drive! Let's find that
bench and get this over with!
This must be the bench. I'll leave the ID and drive here.

There's an envelope. Maybe that's our reward? What do you
think? Should we take it?
{next}Yeah.
{next}You can have it.
{next}Let's leave it here.

I figured you'd say that. But I was thinking the same thing,
actually.

B-But you're the one who had to change clothes and so on.
You can have it.

Sure, it's super sus, but "It's safe" is written neatly on
it in red ink...

Let's have a look inside... Hmm, what is this?
Maybe you can use it? Here, all yours.

No telling if anyone saw us slipping into that vehicle, so
we'd better scram.
Let's go to Vision Square! We can talk more there!
...And off they go. So kind of them to be so helpful.

Hopefully, this'll clear things up a bit. Like what 
"you-know-who" has been up to...

Now, then. No point in lingering here any longer, so I'll be
on my way. Thanks, guys...

What was all that? It feels like someone had us dancing in
the palm of their hand.

Anyway, sorry for dragging you into this. But I think that's
the last of it. Thanks again!

Messing with a D-SAT vehicle is enough trouble for
me for one day.
You be careful, too. All right, I'll see ya later!
Call Hiroko to start her investigation?
{next}[Call her.]
{end}I'm too busy right now.
